case_title: KENNETH MEISLIN VS. DAVID MINASSIAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEISLIN, KENNETH SERVED SEP-15-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
